PitchID.description: The unique ID of the pitch

PlayID.description: The unique ID of the play assigned by SportsDataIO

PitchNumberThisAtBat.description: The number of pitches in the at bat in which the pitch occurred.

PitcherID.description: The PlayerID of the pitcher who threw the pitch

HitterID.description: The unique PlayerID of the hitter who represents the play

Outs.description: The number of outs when the pitch occurred

BallsBeforePitch.description: The number of balls the pitcher has thrown before the current pitch

StrikesBeforePitch.description: The number of strikes the pitcher has thrown before the current pitch

Strike.description: Whether the pitch was a strike (true/false)

Ball.description: Whether the pitch was a ball (true/false)

Foul.description: Whether the pitch was hit foul (true/false)

Swinging.description: Whether the hitter struck out swinging (true/false)

Looking.description: Whether or not the hitter struck out looking (returns true/false)
